caveats: Curated register: stages follow public NRC dockets and company disclosures; confidence H/M/L per row, hover for notes and verification basis. Design-certification rows end at Granted by nature. EDGAR link opens the issuer’s filings (licensing language in 10-K/S-1); NRC link opens the relevant licensing hub. DOE authorization rows are federal-site paths, not NRC licences. Maintained with the weekly research pass — an automatic EDGAR language-diff flagger is on the roadmap.

items.note: First COLA denied Jan 2022; re-engaged via pre-application, phased COLA resubmission underway (phase 1 submitted 2025). DOE reactor-pilot selectee for fuel-line work.
Fuel line at INL using recovered EBR-II material; proceeds under DOE site authorization, not an NRC Part 70 licence. Approvals to proceed 2024-25.
Design certification final rule effective Feb 2023 — first SMR design certified in the US. Design-cert track ends at Granted; deployment licensing is site-specific.
Standard design approval application submitted Jan 2023; NRC approval 2025. RoPower (Romania) FEED runs off this design.
Construction permit application submitted Mar 2025 and docketed — first advanced-reactor CP application at an industrial site. Grid: ERCOT.
Fuel fabrication facility licence application submitted Apr 2022, docketed and under NRC review.
Licensed and operating — naval and research reactor fuel; decades-running Category I facility.
Nuclear Fuel Services subsidiary — licensed, operating; HEU downblending and naval fuel.
DoD Strategic Capabilities Office transportable microreactor; built, moving through testing at INL under federal authorization rather than NRC licence.
HALEU demonstration cascade operating since Oct 2023 under amended licence; first US HALEU production.
Design certified and renewed; deployed at Vogtle. Cameco exposure via 49% Westinghouse stake with Brookfield.
Source-material licences; production restarted 2024. Texas ISR assets run under agreement-state regulation.
NRC pre-application engagement opened 2024-25; no docketed application yet.
Fuel development with INL under GAIN/DOE agreements; NRC licensing would follow a lead-fuel-assembly path later this decade.
US NRC pre-application engagement; CNSC (Canada) vendor design review phase 2 completed — strongest non-US regulatory footing in the set.
Early regulatory engagement stated; verify docket activity before relying on stage.
Combined licence application for multi-unit AP1000 campus submitted 2025; docketing status to verify. Hyperscale-adjacent load thesis.
DOE reactor-pilot programme selectee (2025) — federal-site authorization path available alongside eventual NRC track.
Industrial-scale TRISO from ex-USNC assets; NRC fuel-facility licensing intended, pre-licensing today.
Very early; treat stage as directional until a docket exists.
